ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( TEXT(Area__c) <> "UN-Unknown", OR( ISBLANK(BillingCountry), AND( BillingCountry = "Australia", NOT( OR( LEFT(TEXT(Area__c), 2) = "AU", LEFT(TEXT(Area__c), 2) = "NZ" ) ) ), AND( BillingCountry <> "Australia", LEFT(TEXT(Area__c), 2) <> CASE( BillingCountry, "Brunei Darussalam", "BN", "Indonesia", "ID", "India", "IN", "Malaysia", "MY", "New Zealand", "NZ", "Philippines", "PH", "Singapore", "SG", "Thailand", "TH", "Vietnam", "VN", "Afghanistan", "AF", "Cambodia", "KH", "Lao People's Democratic Republic", "LA", "Myanmar", "MM", "Pakistan", "PK", "" ) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please assign the correct area of the country
